race.comment: Good contest with some handy types engaged. BABY DAISY (8) finally saluted at start twenty when up in trip for a fighting on-pace victory over 1175m at Albury in the heavy (9) going. Well in with the 3kg claim and expected to go close from the good gate. TASSALINA (3) settled back from the outside draw before rounding them up with ridiculous ease on debut to score by 3.5 lens as fav over 1000m at Wagga. Has a ton of upside and the rise in weight is offset from the good gate. Go close. ROYAL MEMORY (5) win record hardly excites but indicated she was near her top with a gallant on-pace second over 1200m at Canberra. Returned good figures on that occasion and this looks slightly easier. GO COMMANDO (1) Savabeel gelding resuming. Sprinted quickly on debut with a soft win in the small field over 1175m at Albury. Up in trip when he gripped on late for a narrow third over 1400m at Orange. Expected to have strengthened over the break and returns with the one trial placing over 800m. Respect.
